name: streamhub-web
//livekit-client-pin: PINNED to 2.15.7: validated publish+subscribe+data vs livekit-server 1.8.4 on node01 (2.20 cannot PUBLISH against 1.8.4 — negotiation times out), and the dashboard's own Broadcast/Meeting/Radio pages publish via livekit-client directly. @livekit/components-react is held at 2.9.15 (last release whose peer is ^2.13.3, satisfied by 2.15.7; 2.9.16+ demand >=2.15.14 and 2.9.18+ import token/serializer APIs absent in 2.15.7, which breaks the vite bundle). The `overrides` block keeps the ENTIRE tree on the single validated 2.15.7. server 1.8.4 <-> client 2.15.7 is a validated pair — upgrade server, livekit-client AND @livekit/components-react in lockstep (roadmap note).
